summary: Iteration 58: AI Document Suggestion Features - All features verified working. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 8 features verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified AI Document Suggestion features. Key findings: (1) POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-step-docs returns AI suggestions for a specific step with doc_name, description, is_mandatory, doc_type fields, (2) POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-bulk returns AI suggestions for all steps of a product as a dict keyed by step name, (3) Admin workflow editor has 'AI Auto-Fill Docs' button (data-testid='ai-bulk-suggest-btn') with purple styling and Sparkles icon, (4) Admin step editor has 'AI Suggest' button (data-testid='ai-suggest-docs-btn') next to 'Add Document' button, (5) CM case detail has 'AI Suggest' button (data-testid='ai-suggest-step-{index}') per unlocked step with Sparkles icon, (6) Client 'Documents & Steps' tab shows UnifiedDocumentView with progress card, stats, and step cards, (7) AI endpoints require admin or case_manager role (403 for clients), (8) Audit logs are created for AI suggestions.

ai_suggest_step_docs_api.details: POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-step-docs returns suggestions array with doc_name, description, is_mandatory, doc_type. Admin and CM can access, client gets 403.

ai_suggest_bulk_api.details: POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-bulk returns suggestions dict keyed by step name. Each step has array of document suggestions.

admin_ai_auto_fill_button.details: Admin Products -> Edit Workflow shows 'AI Auto-Fill Docs' button with Sparkles icon and purple styling (data-testid='ai-bulk-suggest-btn').

admin_ai_suggest_per_step.details: Admin Edit Workflow Step dialog shows 'AI Suggest' button next to 'Add Document' button (data-testid='ai-suggest-docs-btn').

cm_ai_suggest_per_step.details: CM case detail shows 'AI Suggest' button per unlocked step with Sparkles icon and purple styling (data-testid='ai-suggest-step-{index}').

client_documents_steps_tab.details: Client sidebar shows 'Documents & Steps' tab. Old tabs (Workflow Steps, Document Checklist, Doc Completion, Action Required) are removed.

unified_document_view.details: UnifiedDocumentView shows Document Progress card (0% completion), stats (Required/Uploaded/Pending/Requested), and expandable step cards with upload buttons.

audit_log_creation.details: AI suggestion endpoints create audit log entries with action 'ai_doc_suggestion' or 'ai_bulk_doc_suggestion'.

admin_workflow_editor.ai_auto_fill_button: Visible with Sparkles icon, purple styling, text 'AI Auto-Fill Docs'
admin_workflow_editor.workflow_steps: 4 steps for Canada PR: Integration Test Step, ECA, IELTS/CELPIP/PTE CORE, COPR

admin_step_editor.ai_suggest_button: Visible next to 'Add Document' button with Sparkles icon
admin_step_editor.document_requirements: Shows existing docs like 'Passport' with Mandatory tag

cm_case_detail.ai_suggest_buttons: 1 AI Suggest button visible in unlocked step
cm_case_detail.add_doc_buttons: 1 +Add Doc button visible in unlocked step

client_documents_steps.progress_card: Shows 0% completion (0/3 docs) with gradient color
client_documents_steps.step_cards: 3 expandable step cards with status badges and document counts

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
